PICKLERFRIGIL-GLISTENING_AMETHYST.descri: At the start of your turn, applies {HypothermiaPower:diff()} [gold]Hypothermia[/gold] to a random enemy.
PICKLERFRIGIL-GLISTENING_AMETHYST.title: Glistening Amethyst
PICKLERFRIGIL-RADIANT_BISMUTH.descriptio: At the start of your turn, applies {HypothermiaPower:diff()} [gold]Hypothermia[/gold] to a random enemy 3 times.
PICKLERFRIGIL-RADIANT_BISMUTH.title: Radiant Bismuth
